What is Immediate Fortune?

Immediate Fortune is an intuitive and secure Bitcoin and cryptocurrency trading, reporting, and charting platform that offers access to more than 100 coins, dozens of trading pairs, spot dealing, and credit trading.

The cryptocurrency portfolio management and reporting platform allows you to automate and streamline your crypto trading strategies and trade your favorite crypt assets without hassle. You can trade Bitcoin, Tether, Ripple, Ether, Dogecoin, Cardano, Solana, and Litecoin.

Immediate Fortune offers a smooth and seamless trading and management experience with exciting options across multiple instruments and asset classes, including cryptos, altcoins, and indices. The trading platform also lets you find top traders to copy, so you can hopefully make better decisions. You can automatically open and close your crypto trades and watch your cryptocurrency balance and portfolio grow.

The trading platform provides a wide range of portfolio management features, such as rebalancing, Dollar-Cost Averaging (DCA), and asset allocation to help you mitigate risks. Immediate Fortune has a user-friendly and intuitive interface and is available to new and seasoned traders looking to trade Bitcoin, Tether, Ripple, Ether, Dogecoin, Solana, and Litecoin.

Committed to Your Growth and Long-term Success

Trading cryptocurrencies, such as Bitcoin and Ether, requires considerable research and analysis. Also, it takes time to determine how the market is moving or what trends are unraveling.

If you are new to the dynamic world of crypto assets and online assets and don't have the time to learn how to trade cryptocurrencies and master the markets, educational resources, charts and graphs, and strategies like copy trading and trading simulation will help you achieve your goals and mitigate risks.

The trading platform provides fundamental tools, features, and educational resources to help you continuously improve so you can hopefully make better and more prudent decisions.

Real-Time Price Alerts

If you would like to save time and trade more, it is better to spend your valuable time managing crypto trades than staring at various charts and graphs, waiting for a price to reach a certain level.

With Immediate Fortune, you can set up a price alert to be notified whenever a market reaches your expected price so you can hopefully make the most of an opportunity.

Use Alerts to Watch and Monitor Multiple Markets

Are you a day trader? If so, you have to keep track of the entry and exit prices to make suitable decisions. Use price alerts and notifications to have the network monitor the charts and graphs while looking for the next entries.

This is valuable as it will considerably improve your ability to trade in more than one market.

LEARN MORE

Portfolio Management and Screening Tools to Keep You Informed

Portfolio Management

With Immediate Fortune, you can conveniently track and manage your crypto portfolio and manage risks. The trading platform offers hundreds of cryptocurrencies, such as Ripple and Tether, and offers real-time price tracking, insights, news, and alerts, as well as crypto portfolio analytics and management tools.

This means that you will never miss a beat. You can see and analyze your portfolio performance, set alerts, and track your assets in real time.

Screening Tools

The trading platform offers advanced screening tools so that you can filter cryptocurrencies, such as Litecoin and Ripple, based on various criteria, including market cap, trade volume, and price changes.

Leading Blockchain Platforms Driving the Industry

Blockchain technology is picking up pace and gaining momentum nowadays. For example, the platform that emerged in 2009 as Bitcoin has quickly become a mainstream infrastructure. Blockchain has many uses in various industries, such as healthcare, logistics, supply chain, legal, education, and more.

Blockchain platforms, such as Ethereum, are designed and built to make business processes and procedures more efficient and transparent. There are many leading blockchain platforms, each with unique features, underlying infrastructure, and capabilities.

Here are a few of the most popular ones:

Bitcoin

Bitcoin is the first, well-known, and groundbreaking blockchain platform. Bitcoin was created in 2009 and is used for peer-to-peer transactions. It accounts for almost 40% of the entire crypto world's value. This is why it is reasonable and realistic to claim that the Bitcoin blockchain is the most popular.

Hyperledger Fabric

You may have heard of Hyperledger Fabric. It is proposed as a foundation for developing solutions or platforms with a modular architecture. It's a modular, open, and general-purpose framework that provides unique access control and identity management features.

This makes Hyperledger Fabric suitable for various industrial uses like track-and-trace of supply chains, loyalty and mechanisms, trade finance, and clearing and settlement of various financial assets.

One of the main features of Hyperledger Fabric is that it enables a network of networks. So, participants of the Fabric network collaborate and work together. Still, since business organizations prefer to keep some of their crucial data private, they often maintain separate relationships within the networks.

IBM Blockchain

This is another leading blockchain. IBM Blockchain, like others, is a private, decentralized blockchain network. It has been the most successful and popular with enterprise organizations that are less risk-averse.

IBM Blockchain technology is valuable as it empowers businesses and companies to digitize transactions with the help of a secured and shared ledger.

Note that the IBM Blockchain developer tool was carefully designed to be functional, flexible, and customizable. Also, IBM has created a user-friendly and intuitive interface to simplify and streamline critical tasks, like setting up, rapidly deploying, and testing smart contracts.

Avalanche

Avalanche is an upcoming crypto and blockchain platform that rivals Ethereum. The platform is well-known for its scalability and speed. It's a decentralized, open-source proof of stake (PoS) blockchain with amazing smart contract functionality.

Hailed as the quickest smart-contracts platform in the business, the blockchain gives users the ability to swiftly and inexpensively develop decentralized platforms and solutions. Users can also scale rapidly with minimal hardware. Avalanche is also energy efficient, touting CPU-Optimal energy efficiency.

Binance Smart Chain

Binance Smart Chain is a newer and more reliable blockchain platform that was created by Binance. The platform is designed to be cheaper and faster than Ethereum, and it has gained popularity for its low transaction charges.

The platform operates on a PoS consensus model, and its native token, the Binance Coin, can also be staked in order to contribute to network safety and security and vote on various governance protocols.

Ethereum

Ethereum is the second-largest and most famous blockchain platform and is used for building decentralized platforms. Ethereum is a suitable blockchain platform for smart contracts and Web3, including NFTs, decentralized finance, crypto staking, and decentralized social networks.

It allows developers and other professionals to create smart contracts and decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs).

Cardano

Cardano is a popular third-generation blockchain platform and is well-known for its focus on security and sustainability. This open, PoS platform is the first founded on credible peer-reviewed research. Cardano's goal is to be a facilitator and enabling force for positive change and progress.

The blockchain is designed to be more energy-efficient than other blockchain platforms and leverages a proof-of-stake consensus mechanism.

DISCOVER MORE

What is a Diversifiable Risk?

Like in other types of markets, trading cryptocurrencies, such as Bitcoin, Tether, Ripple, Solana, and Litecoin, comes with some degree of risk. Keep in mind that poor risk management practices and protocols could spell severe negative consequences for traders.

A diversifiable risk, also referred to as unsystematic risk or specific risk, is a risk that is specific to an individual asset, crypto, company or sector and can be lowered through diversification. Diversifiable risk represents the possibility that there may be a change in the price of a crypto coin because of the specific characteristics and traits of that coin.

As diversifiable risk isn't related to the overall market or economy, you can diversify it by trading a variety of coins and online assets.

You should know that there are two main types of risk: systematic risk and unsystematic risk. Systematic risk arises because of uncontrollable variables and factors that are not asset specific and impacts the whole market, leading to considerable fluctuation in the prices of all assets.

Diversifiable risk includes various risks like business risks, regulatory risks, financial risks, and management risks that are unique to a specific crypto. You can reduce diversifiable risk through diversification, which entails spreading assets across multiple sectors.

For example, one simple way to diversify is to trade several different cryptocurrencies, such as Litecoin and Ripple, each with unique characteristics and market cycles.

By trading a variety of assets and coins, the effect of any one particular event is minimized, reducing the overall portfolio risk. If you are a new trader with limited knowledge of the market, one of the simplest and safest options for participating in the cryptocurrency market is to diversify your holdings. For example, a uniquely selected and curated basket of equally weighted coins and tokens represents this option.

You should know that although diversifiable risk can be lowered, it can't be completely eliminated. There's always some risk associated with trading crypto assets, such as Bitcoin, Tether, and Ripple, and you should conduct thorough research and analysis before making any trading decisions.

Why Choose Immediate Fortune

Transparency

The team at the trading platform believes in transparency, which is in their DNA. All performance and price data is shared openly with traders and other market participants! Also, there are no hidden charges.

Backtesting Tools

Immediate Fortune offers backtesting tools and features that allow traders and users to test their trading strategies based on reliable historical data, providing valuable insights into the effectiveness and suitability of their strategies. This will hopefully help you make better decisions.

Innovation

The team at Immediate Fortune constantly analyzes your needs and preferences to provide new features and optimize your trading and charting experience, always innovating and thinking outside the box!

Research & Analysis

Study crypto markets and make better decisions with historical datasets optimized for quick advanced research. The trading platform offers unmatched scope, and depth of data, so you can stay updated on various crypto assets, like Bitcoin, Ripple, Ethereum, and Solana.

Service Orientation

The platform's team is here for you! You can reach them through chat, phone, and email!

Immediate Fortune - FAQs

What is a blockchain Oracle?

Blockchain oracles are important entities that help connect blockchains to external platforms, allowing and facilitating smart contracts to execute depending on key real-world inputs and outputs. Blockchains are designed to be transparent, secure, and immutable.

However, note that they have limited ability to access data outside their network. For instance, if a smart contract on a blockchain network needs to access weather information to execute its function, it needs an oracle to provide that information.

It is a protocol or third-party service for transferring verified, reliable data to the blockchain so that it can be used on many platforms. Oracles close the gap between the external world and the blockchain that hosts various decentralized financial platforms and cryptocurrency transactions.

So, without an oracle, blockchain solutions and platforms don't have any way to interact with off-chain data.

Who is Vitalik Buterin?

Vitalik Buterin is a popular Russian-Canadian computer scientist and programming professional who is best known as the co-founder of Ethereum, the second-biggest crypto by market capitalization. Vitalik had always had a passion and flare for mathematics and computer languages, being recognized as a gifted kid when he was very young. He was born on Jan 31, 1994, in Kolomna, Russia, and grew up in Canada.

In 2011, Vitalik showed interest in Bitcoin when the platform was only 2 years old. Soon after that, the child prodigy began to realize the potential and uses of the platform before him.

After becoming interested in Bitcoin and blockchain, he co-founded Bitcoin Magazine the next year. In 2013, he started working on the Ethereum project, aiming to create a decentralized platform for developing decentralized solutions and smart contracts.

Buterin's work and passion for Ethereum have earned him numerous awards and accolades, including being named to Forbes' "30 Under 30" list in 2018. He also received the Thiel Fellowship in 2014. Vitalik is also a vocal advocate for blockchain platforms and has spoken at many conferences and events worldwide.

Can I trade Bitcoin with $100?

Yes, it is possible to trade Bitcoin with $100. Many cryptocurrency exchanges allow traders to invest in Bitcoin with a small amount of money. However, the amount of Bitcoin that can be purchased with $100 will depend on the current market price of Bitcoin.

What is leverage trading?

Leverage trading is a strategy where an investor uses borrowed funds (i.e., leverage) to trade financial instruments such as stocks, currencies, or cryptocurrencies, with the aim of increasing the potential returns on investment. In other words, leverage trading allows traders to control a larger position in the market with a smaller amount of capital.
